af_score_components.notes: Airtable MCP server. Has MCP (quality 85). Official Airtable integration. Excellent documentation. OAuth2 required. Rate limits well-documented (5 requests/second). Business process automation focused.

security_score_components.security_notes: HTTPS enforced. OAuth2 with granular scopes (read, write, create, delete per base). SOC2/GDPR/ISO27001 certified. Row-level security via base structure. Excellent credential management.

reliability_score_components.reliability_notes: Airtable has enterprise SLA. Rate limits generous. Cursor pagination. Retry guidance. Ideal for spreadsheet-driven automation at scale.

af_score_components.notes: AI Status Dashboard MCP. Has MCP (quality 70). Monitoring/dashboarding tool. Documentation moderate. Auth for dashboard. Rate limits for metrics. DevOps focused.

security_score_components.security_notes: HTTPS enforced. Auth required. Metrics/logs could expose system info. Fine-grained RBAC. Secret redaction in logs. Suitable for operational monitoring.

reliability_score_components.reliability_notes: Monitoring tool availability critical. No SLA for MCP wrapper. Suitable for status tracking.

af_score_components.notes: AI Studio MCP server. Has MCP (quality 75). AI development environment. Documentation good. Auth for studio operations. Rate limits for operations. Development tools focused.

security_score_components.security_notes: Dev environment (code access). HTTPS enforced. Auth for studio. Generated models/code review needed. Credential handling in dev workflows.

reliability_score_components.reliability_notes: Dev tool reliability (build/test performance). No SLA. Suitable for AI development automation.

af_score_components.notes: Aiwen GeoIP MCP server (Chinese tool?). Has MCP (quality 70). IP geolocation service. Documentation moderate. Auth for GeoIP API. Rate limits from provider. Location services focused.

security_score_components.security_notes: HTTPS enforced. IP lookups are privacy-relevant (user location). Auth via API key. GeoIP databases have privacy implications. No PII stored (IP-only).

reliability_score_components.reliability_notes: GeoIP service reliability (network dependent). Database update frequency. Suitable for location-based agent operations.

af_score_components.notes: Akilat Leave Manager MCP. Has MCP (quality 65). HR leave management system. Documentation moderate. Auth for HR system. Rate limits undocumented. HR operations focused.

security_score_components.security_notes: HTTPS enforced. HR data (sensitive). Auth required. Employee leave data (privacy-critical). GDPR/local employment law compliance. Audit logging for HR audit trail.

reliability_score_components.reliability_notes: HR system availability important. Leave processing critical for operations. Suitable for leave automation.

af_score_components.notes: Azure Kubernetes Service (AKS) MCP. Has MCP (quality 80). Kubernetes cluster management. Excellent documentation. Azure auth required. Rate limits documented. Infrastructure ops focused.

security_score_components.security_notes: HTTPS enforced (Azure). Strong Azure RBAC. Fine-grained Kubernetes permissions. SOC2/FedRAMP certified infrastructure. Secrets management via Azure Key Vault. Enterprise security.

reliability_score_components.reliability_notes: Azure AKS has enterprise SLA. Kubernetes reliability. Cluster scaling and failover. Suitable for infrastructure automation at scale.

af_score_components.notes: Akshare MCP server (Chinese financial data). Has MCP (quality 75). Financial market data aggregator. Documentation good. No auth required (free data). Rate limits for API calls. Finance analytics focused.

security_score_components.security_notes: HTTPS enforced. Public financial data (no PII). No auth needed. Chinese financial regulations compliance. Data aggregator (many sources). No API key exposure risk.

reliability_score_components.reliability_notes: Financial data provider reliability (multiple sources). Suitable for finance analysis automation. Good uptime record.

af_score_components.notes: Akshare One MCP (variant of Akshare). Has MCP (quality 75). Financial data distribution. Documentation adequate. No auth. Rate limits. Similar to akshare-mcp-server.

security_score_components.security_notes: Similar to akshare-mcp-server. Public data. No credentials needed.

af_score_components.notes: aktools-pro — unclear (possibly pro version of aktools?). No MCP documented. Documentation minimal. Purpose unclear. Early stage.
AL Dependency MCP server. Has MCP (quality 75). Dependency management tool. Documentation adequate. No auth (local). Rate limits for analysis. Dev tools focused.

security_score_components.security_notes: Local tool. Dependency analysis (code review). No network exposure. Helps identify vulnerable dependencies. Good for supply chain security.

reliability_score_components.reliability_notes: Local tool. Dependency database reliability. Suitable for dev automation.
